title: Polygon
description: Polygon: Simple Polygon. Closed, planar and non-self intersecting. Can be irregular, convex and/or concave.

_v.description:
An ordered set of three-dimensional points defining the curve shape.
The list should not contain any duplicate points - the first point in the list will be treated as both the start and end point.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
